SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Class FrameworkEventDispatcher

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.cpr.FrameworkEventDispatcher
public class FrameworkEventDispatcher extends Object
Manages listener registration and event dispatch for the Atmosphere framework. Handles AsyncSupportListener, AtmosphereResourceListener, and AtmosphereFrameworkListener lifecycle events.
